info.title: Anime API
info.description:
RESTful API for anime information, streaming, and discovery. Built with Node.js and Express.

**Disclaimer:** This API does not store any files. It only links to media hosted on third-party services. Made for educational purposes only.

All endpoints return responses wrapped in:
```json
{ "success": true, "results": { ... } }
```
On error:
```json
{ "success": false, "message": "error description" }
```

tags.name: Anime
tags.description: Anime details, random picks, and quick-tip info

tags.name: Browse
tags.description: Browse by category, genre, filter, and rankings

tags.name: Schedule
tags.description: Airing schedule and next episode times

tags.name: Characters
tags.description: Characters, voice actors, and cast information

get.description:
Returns all homepage sections: spotlights, top anime, schedule, and more.

**Data sources:**
- `topAiring`: Currently Airing anime (via /filter + qtip post-filter by status)
- `latestCompleted`: Finished Airing anime (via /filter + qtip post-filter by status)
- `topUpcoming`: Not Yet Aired anime (from /upcoming page)
- `trending`: Currently returns empty array (section removed from source site)

**Status filtering:** The source site's /filter endpoint does not support server-side status filtering. Instead, results are enriched with qtip data and post-filtered by status (`Currently Airing`, `Finished Airing`, `Not yet aired`).

trending.description: Currently returns empty array (section removed from source site)

get.description: Returns top 10 anime rankings grouped by today, this week, and this month.
Returns currently most searched anime titles.
Returns full details for a specific anime including metadata, synopsis, seasons, characters, and recommendations.
Returns a random anime with full details, related data, and recommendations.
Returns a random anime identifier/slug.
Returns summary data for hover/tooltip cards.

Returns paginated anime listings for a given category.

**Available categories:**
- Listings: `top-airing` (Currently Airing), `ongoing` (alias), `most-popular`, `most-favorite`, `completed` (Finished Airing), `recently-updated`, `recently-added`, `top-upcoming` (Not Yet Aired), `upcoming`
- Types: `movie`, `special`, `ova`, `ona`, `tv`, `music`
- Genres: `genre/action`, `genre/adventure`, `genre/comedy`, `genre/drama`, `genre/fantasy`, `genre/horror`, `genre/romance`, `genre/sci-fi`, etc.
- A-Z: `az-list`, `az-list/a` through `az-list/z`, `az-list/0-9`, `az-list/other`

**Note:** `top-airing`, `ongoing`, `completed` are served via /filter + qtip post-filtering by status. `top-upcoming` uses the /upcoming page directly.
Search for anime by keyword with optional filters. Results are enriched with qtip data (type, rating, status, genres, description, aired date). Supports foreign language input (auto-converted).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Status (`1`=Finished Airing, `2`=Currently Airing, `3`=Not Yet Aired). Also accepts: `FINISHED`, `AIRING`, `UPCOMING`

get.description: Advanced filtering with multiple criteria. Same parameters as search but returns additional pagination metadata. Results are enriched with qtip data (type, rating, status, genres, description, aired date).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Status (`1`=Finished Airing, `2`=Currently Airing, `3`=Not Yet Aired). Also accepts: `FINISHED`, `AIRING`, `UPCOMING`

get.description: Returns autocomplete suggestions for a search keyword. Supports foreign language input.
Returns all episodes for a given anime.
Returns available streaming servers for a specific episode.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Anime slug (not used directly, but required in route)

get.description:
Returns streaming source URLs, subtitle tracks, and intro/outro markers for an episode.

**Server names:** `vidstreaming`, `vidcloud`, `douvideo` (legacy names `hd-1` and `hd-2` are also accepted for backward compatibility).

**Type:** `sub` or `dub`.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Anime slug with episode param (must contain `ep=<number>`)

get.description: Same as `/api/stream` but uses fallback/backup streaming providers. Use when primary sources are unavailable.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Anime slug with episode param (must contain `ep=<number>`)

get.description: Returns the anime airing schedule for a specific date.

parameters.name: tzOffset
parameters.description: Timezone offset in minutes (default: -330 for IST)

get.description: Returns the scheduled date/time for the next episode of a specific anime.
Returns paginated list of characters and their voice actors for a specific anime. **Note:** This endpoint currently returns empty data as the source site has removed the underlying AJAX endpoint.
Returns detailed information about a specific character including voice actors and animeography.
Returns detailed information about a voice actor including their roles.
Returns paginated anime list for a specific producer or studio.
Returns paginated watchlist for a specific user.

TrendingAnime.description: Currently returns empty array (trending section removed from source site)

showType.description: HD, Unknown, or enriched type from qtip

sub.description: Episode count if available, true if present, null if absent

dub.description: Episode count if available, true if present, null if absent

showType.description: Enriched from qtip (e.g. TV Series, Movie, ONA)
